'''Issan Len''' was a cyberneticist in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] who created the prototype [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[X0-X1]], in an experiment to create a droid that could self-reprogram and manage the myriad administrative functions of a [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. X0-X1 took control of Cloud City upon its activation, and forced the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[F-3PO]] to kill Doctor Len, despite F-3PO's misgivings.<ref name="CC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Issan Len first appeared in the [[West End Games]] roleplaying adventure book ''[[Crisis on Cloud City (adventure book)|Crisis on Cloud City]]''. He was later mentioned in ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 54]]'', but was spelled erroneously as "Lem."
